heading: Fair market value determinations for linear rights-of-way across public lands and national forests
label: 15925 Fair market value determinations for linear rights-of-way across public lands and national forests

children.text: the Secretary of the Interior shall update section 2806.20 of title 43, Code of Federal Regulations, as in effect on , to revise the per acre rental fee zone value schedule by State, county, and type of linear right-of-way use to reflect current values of land in each zone; andAugust 8, 2005

the Secretary of Agriculture shall make the same revision for linear rights-of-way granted, issued, or renewed under title V of the Federal Lands Policy and Management Act of 1976 ( et seq.) on National Forest System land.43 U.S.C. 1761

children.heading: Fair market value rental determination for linear rights-of-way
children.label: b Fair market value rental determination for linear rights-of-way
children.text: The fair market value rent of a linear right-of-way across public lands or National Forest System lands issued under section 504 of the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976 () or shall be determined in accordance with subpart 2806 of title 43, Code of Federal Regulations, as in effect on (including the annual or periodic updates specified in the regulations), and as updated in accordance with subsection (a).43 U.S.C. 1764section 185 of title 30August 8, 2005
